channel.description: An eclectic music mix, (almost) every Monday
channel.title: Monday Music Mix

item.title: Let this disappearing act melt away by creating another gorgeous mix?
item.description: I'm all tapped out, bud. I wish I could.

item.title: Thirtysixth Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally...
item.description:
Thirtysixth

Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.

Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.

Monday Music Mix: 36

Album art featuring work by Erik Jones

Tracklist:

  1. The Kite String Tangle - Tennis Court (Lorde cover)
  2. Say Lou Lou - Beloved
  3. Empress Of - Realize You
  4. Dum Dum Girls - Lost Boys and Girls Club
  5. Bastille - (I Just) Died In Your Arms Tonight (Cutting Crew cover)
  6. Blood Orange - You’re Not Good Enough
  7. Twin Shadow - Old Love New Love
  8. STRANGERS - London Light
  9. Grizzly Bear - Will Calls
  10. Mogwai - Remurdered
  11. High Highs - A Real Hero (College & Electric Youth cover)
  12. Angel Haze - Summer Time Sadness (Lana Del Rey cover)
  13. Ellie Goulding - Mirror
  14. Oh Land - Love You Better (John Dillinger remix)

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: Thirtyfifth A bit late given this is going up in the last hour of Monday but it still counts, right?...
item.description:
Thirtyfifth

A bit late given this is going up in the last hour of Monday but it still counts, right? Right. Left out a lot of really great music off this mix. Maybe someday I should do a Monday Music Mix: Rejects edition. Soon.

Monday Music Mix: 35

Album art featuring work by Andrew Salgado

Tracklist:

  1. Chromeo - Over Your Shoulder
  2. White Denim - Pretty Green
  3. Young Galaxy - Sea Drug
  4. Wolf Alice - Blush
  5. Meg Myers - Desire
  6. Phantogram - Black Out Days
  7. Society - 14 Hours
  8. Braids - Hossak
  9. Anna Lunoe - Breathe
  10. Jungle - The Heat
  11. Yamantaka // Sonic Titan - One
  12. Shy Girls - Still Not Falling
  13. The Wyld - Odyssey
  14. Goldroom - Embrace
  15. Laura Welsh - Undiscovered

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: Thirtyfourth New week, new mix. A little birdy from the mountains had to prod me to post this...
item.description:
Thirtyfourth

New week, new mix. A little birdy from the mountains had to prod me to post this today.

Monday Music Mix: 34

Album art featuring work by Mapache Salado

Tracklist:

  1. Ha Ha Tonka - Colorful Kids
  2. Bear Mountain - Congo
  3. Join the Riot - Queen Marmalade
  4. Haim - The Wire
  5. Dum Dum Girls - Mine Tonight
  6. Pure Bathing Culture - Dream the Dare
  7. Avec Sans - Hold On
  8. Cat Power - Cherokee
  9. Keep Shelly in Athens - Oostende
  10. Tree - Demons (feat. Beat Culture and Lena Kuhn)
  11. The Weeknd - Love in the Sky
  12. Porcelain Raft - The Way Out
  13. Lolo - Heard it from a Friend
  14. RJD2 - Her Majesty’s Socialist Request
  15. Happy Hollows - Endless

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: Thirtythird As always, back after a fairly long period of absence. MMM isn’t dead, not just...
item.description:
Thirtythird

As always, back after a fairly long period of absence. MMM isn’t dead, not just yet.

Monday Music Mix: 33

Album art featuring work by Fernando Vincente

Tracklist:

  1. Bell X1 - Starlings Over Brighton Pier
  2. Galleries - Midnight Rush
  3. Poolside - If We Make It
  4. Mikky Ekko - Kids
  5. Isle - Bayview
  6. Chvurches - Gun
  7. Gold Panda - We Work Nights
  8. Little Daylight - Name In Lights
  9. Reviving Cecilia - Two Kinds
  10. jj - Fågelsången
  11. Lolo - Weapon For Saturday
  12. Solid Gold - Danger Zone (Kenny Loggins cover)
  13. Zaz - Eblouie Par La Nuit
  14. Klingande - Jubel

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Hat tip: Rhea R for introducing me to Klingande

Download album

item.title: Monday Music Mix is a great way to discover nice music and I’m glad that you are continuing it on tumblr. Had one request. The links for 27, 28 and 29 seem to be broken. Can you please put them up again?
item.description: Fixed. Happy listening!

item.title: Thirtysecond Brand new mix at a brand new address. New Postal Service demo, a fantastic AlunaGeorge...
item.description:
Thirtysecond

Brand new mix at a brand new address. New Postal Service demo, a fantastic AlunaGeorge track and some other surprises.

Monday Music Mix: 32

Album art featuring work by Yuko Shimizu

Tracklist:

  1. Phoenix - Entertainment
  2. Haim - Falling
  3. Lemolo - Open Air
  4. Now, Now - Dead Oaks
  5. Magic Man - Paris
  6. James Blake - Digital Lion
  7. Earl Sweatshirt - Chum
  8. Dirty Projectors - There’s A Fire
  9. Jamaican Queens - Kids Get Away
  10. The Postal Service - A Tattered Line Of String
  11. Slowdance - Boyfriend
  12. Weeknight - Devil
  13. London Grammar - Hey Now
  14. AlunaGeorge - Attracting Flies

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: ThirtyfirstFirst mix of 2013! There’s been a lot of good...
item.description:
Thirtyfirst

First mix of 2013! There’s been a lot of good music that has been listened to while I was gone. Someone asked me to put a mix out today, so here it is.

Monday Music Mix: 31

Album art featuring work by Feline Zegers

Tracklist:

  1. A.C. Newman - I’m Not Talking
  2. Slam Donahue - Bug in the Sun
  3. Churchill - Change
  4. The Ampersands - Try This
  5. Tegan & Sara - Fool to Cry
  6. Hundred Waters - Me & Anodyne
  7. WhoMadeWho - Inside World
  8. The Vaccines - Aftershave Ocean
  9. Jenny Owen Youngs - Pirates
  10. Alt-J - Breezeblocks
  11. AlunaGeorge - Thinkin Bout You (Frank Ocean cover)
  12. Frank Ocean - Wise Man
  13. Rhye - The Fall
  14. Kids Without Instruments - Stardust
  15. Jeff Rosenstock - Twinkle
  16. The One AM Radio - In A City Without Seasons
  17. TV Girl - I Wonder Who She’s Kissing Now
  18. The Bloody Beetroots - Chronicles of a Fallen Love (feat. Greta Svabo Bech)
  19. The Weeknd - Enemy
  20. French Kiwi Juice - Lying Together
  21. Local Natives - Heavy Feet
  22. MØ - Pilgrim
  23. Sky Ferreira - Everything Is Embarrassing
  24. BJ Tran, Arct Tabanas, Gerald Fermin, & Jayne Baltazar - Erase Me (Kid Cudi cover)
  25. Free Energy - Girls Want Rock
  26. Sick Sad World - Alone All the Time (Leisure mix)
  27. Wild Ones - It’s Real
  28. Friends - Friend Crush
  29. WU LYF - Triumph
  30. Jordan Corey - Let Your Love Walk In (Paloma Faith cover)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Part 1 (1-15) | Part 2 (16-30)

item.title: ThirtiethLate. Happy birthday, L (it’s still your birthday...
item.description:
Thirtieth

Late.

Happy birthday, L (it’s still your birthday in some time zone).

Monday Music Mix: 30

Album art featuring work by Stella Im Hultberg

Tracklist:

  1. Toro y Moi - So Many Details
  2. Halina Larsson - Fires and French Horns
  3. Twin Shadow - Five Seconds
  4. Sun Kil Moon - Sunshine in Chicago
  5. Dust Covered Carpet - Fragile Soul  Heavy Heart
  6. Brythoniaid Male Voice Choir - Blue Monday (New World Order cover)
  7. Mike Landry - Heartbeat
  8. Françoise Hardy - Le Temps De L'amour
  9. Said The Whale - Heavy Ceiling
  10. Friends - Mind Control
  11. A.C. Newman - Encyclopedia of Classic Takedowns
  12. Death Grips - @deathgripz
  13. Lace Curtains - Bedroom Honesty
  14. Jessie Ware - Night Light (Wild Beasts remix)
  15. Empress Of - Don’t Tell Me
  16. Nicole Miglis - Stay Small
  17. Dean Blunt  - Track 2 (feat. Inga Copeland)
  18. The Stills - Don’t Talk Down
  19. Crystal Castles - Wrath of God
  20. Atlas Genius - Islands (The xx cover)
  21. Black City Lights - Rivers

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album | Mirror

item.title: Twentyninth Finally! I’m making a habit out of this aren’t I?...
item.description:
Twentyninth

Finally! I’m making a habit out of this aren’t I? But the truth is, I’ve heard so much awful music of late that I haven’t been compelled to put out a mix. That, and trips back home and everything in between. I’m going to try and make this a fortnightly affair but my other pet project completes three years on the 19th, so there’s plenty on my plate and simply not enough clones.

This one has a lot of standout tracks, so happy listening my fellow indie enthusiast.

Monday Music Mix: 29

Album art featuring work by Andrew Bannecker

Tracklist:

  1. Reptile Youth - Shooting Up Sunshine
  2. Jesca Hoop - Hospital (Win Your Love)
  3. Best Coast - The Only Place
  4. The Noisettes - That Girl
  5. Michael Kiwanuka - Bones
  6. Azure Ray - Scattered Like Leaves
  7. Eternal Summers - You Kill
  8. Deap Vally - Gonna Make My Own Money
  9. Passion Pit - Constant Conversations
  10. Kid Cudi - Dennis, Hook Me Up With Some More Of This Whiskey!
  11. Bat For Lashes - Laura
  12. Purity Ring - Fineshrine
  13. Ellie Goulding - Anything Could Happen
  14. Stars - Hold On When You Get Love and Let Go When You Give It
  15. Two Door Cinema Club - Sleep Alone
  16. d’Eon - Now You Do 
  17. Dum Dum Girls - Lord Knows
  18. Jens Lekman - I Know What Love Isn’t
  19. LP - Halo (Beyoncé cover)
  20. jj - High Summer
  21. Jinja Safari - Peter Pan

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album | Mirror

item.title: Twentyeighth It’s been a busy couple of weeks. I moved to New...
item.description:
Twentyeighth

It’s been a busy couple of weeks. I moved to New Delhi not too long ago and I’m still in the middle of rebuilding my life here. I haven’t heard a lot of exceptional music, unfortunately (given the lack of time at hand). But this will have to do, for now.

Monday Music Mix: 28

Album art featuring work by Pavel Ripley

Tracklist:

  1. Javelin - Soda Popinski
  2. Beat Culture - Useless
  3. Ben Folds Five - Do It Anyway
  4. Haim - Go Slow
  5. Charlotte Gainsbourg - Anna
  6. Charli xcx - I’ll Never Know
  7. Air - Seven Stars
  8. Elika - No One Gets Lost
  9. Tiny Victories - Lost Weekend
  10. Dirty Three - Rising Below
  11. Led Er Est - Kaiyo Maru
  12. Gitar - Hippie Dream
  13. Polica - Lay Your Cards Out
  14. Grizzly Bear - Sleeping Ute
  15. The Lost Lovers Brigade - Lonely Neighbour
  16. Emika - Drop The Other
  17. Daughter - Love
  18. Catcall - Paralysed
  19. Harry Rag - Tiny Painting
  20. Feist - Black Tongue
  21. Major Lazer - Get Free (feat. Amber of Dirty Projectors)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album | Mirror

item.title: Twentyseventh It’s been a while since I did a doubleheader. So...
item.description:
Twentyseventh

It’s been a while since I did a doubleheader. So there you have it, fourteen instead of the usual seven. For an exceptional week, and everything else that goes with it.

Monday Music Mix: 27

Album art featuring work by Raphël Vicenzi

Tracklist:

  1. Longwave - Tidal Wave
  2. JJ - Beautiful Life
  3. Arcade Fire - Abraham’s Daughter
  4. Chairlift - Guilty As Charged
  5. Dntel - Bright Night
  6. Little Scream - The Heron and the Fox
  7. Múm - Don’t Be Afraid, You Have Just Got Your Eyes Closed
  8. Van She - Idea Of Happiness
  9. Thievery Corporation - The Time We Lost Our Way (featuring Loulou)
  10. Ramona Falls - Spore
  11. Hot Chip - Flutes
  12. Cats On Fire - A Few Empty Waves
  13. Lower Dens - Brains
  14. Radical Face - Welcome Home

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album | Mirror

item.title:
TwentysixthFor you. Monday Music Mix: 26
Album art featuring...
item.description:
Twentysixth

For you.

Monday Music Mix: 26

Album art featuring work by Tony Larson

Tracklist:

  1. Owl Eyes - Raiders
  2. Wu Lyf - Dirt
  3. Gorillaz - Do Ya Thing (feat. Andre 3000 and James Murphy)
  4. Loon Lake - Bad To Me
  5. The Antlers - Putting The Dog To Sleep
  6. The Mountain Goats - High Hawk Season
  7. Beach House - Myth

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

Got feedback? Who cares. Go away. I don’t want any of it.

item.title:
TwentyfifthI am home. Monday Music Mix: 25
Album art featuring...
item.description:
Twentyfifth

I am home.

Monday Music Mix: 25

Album art featuring work by Michael Molloy

Tracklist:

  1. La Rocca - Non-Believer
  2. Warpaint - Elephants
  3. I’m From Barcelona - The Painter
  4. Ben Howard - Old Pine
  5. Efterklang - Mirador
  6. Vampire Weekend - Cape Cod Kwassa Kwassa (The Teenagers Remix)
  7. The Boy Least Likely To - Be Gentle With Me

 

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

Don’t send me any comments or feedback. I’m not going to read it anyway.

item.title: TwentyfourthThis is getting a bit irregular, isn’t it? The...
item.description:
Twentyfourth

This is getting a bit irregular, isn’t it? The last six weeks have been hellishly busy to say the least. I’ve heard plenty of great music, and it was hard to narrow it down to just seven tracks. Hopefully this will do.

Without further ado.

Monday Music Mix: 24

Album art featuring splendid work by Sam Chivers

Tracklist:

  1. Korallreven - Sa Sa Samoa (For Real For Sure For You Version)
  2. Wild Flag - Romance
  3. Roxy Music - Avalon
  4. Black Marble - Pretender
  5. Bowerbirds - In the Yard
  6. AU - Solid Gold
  7. Grouplove - Tongue Tied

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

Send your love (if any) and feedback through the comments.

item.title: TwentythirdSo after four odd months of absence, MMM is back....
item.description:
Twentythird

So after four odd months of absence, MMM is back. With a bang? Probably not.

I had plans to make this a bit of an elaborate affair with a bit of commentary and such, but thanks to a bit of hectic schedule (work and personal life), it wasn’t meant to be. Perhaps next time.

The format of this project is going to change, more on that soon. In all likelihood there will be a new mix out once every two or three weeks as opposed to every week. If you’d like more recommendations, follow me on Twitter instead.

Also, happy new year.

Album art featuring photography by Bharat Sikka

Monday Music Mix 23

Tracklist:

  1. Cults - Go Outside
  2. Atlas Sound - Te Amo
  3. Pearl and the Puppets - Little Diamonds
  4. Jim Ward - Broken Songs 
  5. Wu Lyf - We Bros
  6. Rich Aucoin - It
  7. Bombay Bicycle Club - Lights Out, Words Gone

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: TwentysecondThis is the sequel (sort of) to the eighteenth mix....
item.description:
Twentysecond

This is the sequel (sort of) to the eighteenth mix. A friend asked for it, and I got carried away. Yes, some artists are a bit mainstream, some tracks are done to death, but that’s not the point.

Listen to eighteenth, then listen to this. Repeat.

Monday Music Mix 22: The Blues, Deus Ex

Tracklist:

  1. Snow Patrol - You Could Be Happy
  2. Girls - Broken Dreams Club
  3. Rachael Yamagata - Over And Over
  4. Bon Iver - Flume
  5. The Honorary Title - Everything I Once Had
  6. Florence and the Machine - Hardest Of Hearts
  7. Wilco - We’re Just Friends
  8. Modest Mouse - Edit The Sad Parts (has a 1+ minute silence in the end)
  9. The Get Up Kids - Overdue
  10. Mumford & Sons - I Gave You All
  11. Switchfoot - On Fire
  12. Billy Bragg & Wilco - At My Window Sad And Lonely
  13. Blue October - Congratulations (Feat. Imogen Heap)
  14. Great Lake Swimmers - Stealing Tomorrow
  15. Nick Cave & The Bad Seeds - O Children
  16. Citizen Cope - Sideways
  17. Longwave - Tidal Wave
  18. Bell X1 - Eve, The Apple Of My Eye
  19. Joseph Gordon-Levitt - I Don’t Want To Live On The Moon
  20. The Cure - Pictures Of You
  21. Falling Up - Islander
  22. Jenny Lewis - Godspeed
  23. Carole King - It’s Too Late Baby
  24. My Drunken Haze - Too Afraid To Love You (Black Keys cover)
  25. Five for Fighting - Dying
  26. Bat for Lashes - I’m On Fire
  27. Cursive - What Have I Done
  28. Josh Groban - February Song
  29. Death Cab for Cutie - The Ice Is Getting Thinner
  30. Arcade Fire - Crown Of Love
  31. The Gaslight Anthem - Here’s Looking At You, Kid
  32. Band of Horses - The Funeral
  33. Jimmy Eat World - 23
  34. Angus & Julia Stone - What You Wanted

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

So this one’s a monster of a mix. So, I’ve split it up in two parts. 

Download: Part 1 | Part 2

item.title: TwentyfirstFor once, on time. I think this mix is pretty...
item.description:
Twentyfirst

For once, on time. I think this mix is pretty interesting. Lots of diverse beats - lots of trippy goodness. Download, listen, spread the love and all that.

Monday Music Mix: 21

Tracklist:

  1. Jens Lekman - An Argument With Myself
  2. Best Coast - Gone Again
  3. SLEEP ∞ OVER - Romantic-Streams
  4. Work Drugs - Catalina Wine Mixer 
  5. Chelan - On the Water
  6. New Animal - Last Winter
  7. Stray Kites - Mieux
  8. Air France - It Feels Good to Be Around You
  9. Canon Blue - A Native (Madison)
  10. Holy Ghost! - Some Children
  11. The Rapture - How Deep Is Your Love
  12. San Cisco - Golden Revolver
  13. Loney Dear - Ignorant Boy, Beautiful Girl
  14. Florence & The Machine - Halo (Beyonce cover)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: TwentiethA mix after a month, and then some. As always,...
item.description:
Twentieth

A mix after a month, and then some. As always, compensating for the lack of regular updates, a fourteen track mix to keep you swell folks happy. 

Monday Tuesday Music Mix: 20

Tracklist:

  1. Sebastien Tellier - La Ritournelle (Mr. Dan’s Mix)
  2. Pepper Rabbit - Murder Room
  3. Mates of State - Maracas
  4. I Break Horses - Winter Beats
  5. Teen Daze - The Harvest
  6. Active Child - Hanging On
  7. Girls - Vomit
  8. My Brightest Diamond - Reaching Through to the Other Side
  9. M83 - Midnight City
  10. Clap Your Hands Say Yeah - Maniac
  11. Southern Shores - Bonfire
  12. Björk- Crystalline
  13. Beirut - Santa Fe
  14. The Morning Benders - Last Night

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

item.title: NineteenthLate yet again, but that’s only because...
item.description:
Nineteenth

Late yet again, but that’s only because I’ve been neck deep in work. And, I celebrated my birthday last weekend. Still hungover a bit, but life’s swell.

Monday Friday Music Mix: 19

Tracklist:

  1. Laura Veirs - Saltbreakers
  2. My Morning Jacket - Circuital
  3. Badly Drawn Boy - This Electric
  4. Clap Your Hands Say Yeah - Same Mistake
  5. Cansei de Ser Sexy (CSS) - Hits Me Like A Rock
  6. Beirut - East Harlem
  7. Iron & Wine - Biting Your Tail
  8. Ghost Estates - Paris
  9. Owl Eyes - Pumped Up Kicks (Foster the People cover)
  10. Starfucker - Born
  11. Cults - You Know What I Mean
  12. Art Brut - Unprofessional Wrestling
  13. Gang Gang Dance - Mindkilla
  14. Future Islands - Before the Bridge

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album

Listen online
